entities.scoreboard: a scoreboard showing the final score

scenes.title: The Empty Stadium
scenes.background_prompt: A small outdoor sports stadium with rows of plastic seats, a grass field, a scoreboard, and floodlights. Evening, lights still on. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A small outdoor sports stadium in the evening, floodlights still on but the stands almost entirely empty. A janitor in a gray jumpsuit and a reflective vest slowly pushes a wide broom between rows of blue and orange plastic seats, sweeping up discarded popcorn bags, paper cups, and ticket stubs. Confetti in team colors — red and white — is scattered across the concrete steps and caught in seat hinges. The grass field below is scarred with cleat marks and the white line markings are scuffed. The scoreboard at the far end still displays the final score: HOME 3 - VISITORS 2. A few forgotten foam fingers and a deflated balloon lie under seats. The atmosphere is quiet and still, the excitement of the game clearly over, only its traces remaining.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place janitor between rows of seats, pushing a wide broom and sweeping up discarded popcorn bags, cups, and ticket stubs. Confetti in red and white scattered on steps.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom foreground, a lush green field is dotted with small white and yellow flowers and patches of clover, with a white painted line marking the corner of a sports field on the right. Moving to the middle ground from left to right, a tall gray stadium light pole stands behind a set of bleachers. The bleachers feature four rows of colorful plastic seats in shades of blue, green, orange, and yellow, many of which are littered with red cups, popcorn boxes, and scraps of paper. A metal railing runs along the top and sides of the seating area. In front of the bleachers is a brown track where a green recycling bin with a white recycling symbol sits. To the right of the bin, the janitor, an elderly man with gray hair, a mustache, and glasses, is bent slightly forward as he sweeps the track with a long-handled broom. He is dressed in a blue jacket, tan trousers, and brown boots. Scattered on the track around him are more pieces of trash, including a popcorn box and a red soda can. Further to the right, a large wooden scoreboard is mounted on two thick wooden posts, featuring various rectangular panels in green, yellow, and blue. A second tall gray stadium light pole rises behind the scoreboard. In the background, a dense line of green deciduous and coniferous trees fills the horizon, with a gray concrete wall visible in the distance through a gap in the foliage. A wooden fence runs behind the scoreboard and trees on the right. The scene is set during a bright day under a clear blue sky filled with several soft, white, fluffy clouds.
